dashboard-ui.description: Files in this domain: Reference for every React component in the Synapse dashboard UI.

electron.description: Files in this domain: Documents the dashboard's three custom React hooks (useDashboardData, useElectronAPI, useResize) and the mergeState() helper that fuses initialization.

ide.description: Files in this domain: Reference for the Code Explorer (IDE) React components: IDEView, IDEWelcome, FileExplorer, CodeEditor (Monaco), EditorTabs, WorkspaceTabs, SearchPanel, SearchResults, DebugToolbar, DebugPanels, DebugConsolePanel, ProblemsPanel.

server.description: Files in this domain: Complete REST API reference for the Synapse SSE server: 22 endpoints (21 REST + 1 SSE) covering dashboards CRUD, statuses, initialization/logs/progress reads, dispatchable tasks, archives, history, queue, and overview.

command-docs.description: Files in this domain: Guide for authoring custom Synapse commands.

project-integration-docs.description: Files in this domain: Reference documentation for all commands in {tracker_root}/_commands/project/.

configuration-docs.description: Files in this domain: Comprehensive reference for Electron app configuration via electron/settings.

profile-docs.description: Files in this domain: Catalog of all 15 built-in agent role profiles in {tracker_root}/_commands/profiles/.

pki-docs.description: Files in this domain: Reference for the Project Knowledge Index (PKI) -- a persistent, auto-accumulating knowledge layer at {project_root}/.

troubleshooting-docs.description: Files in this domain: Comprehensive troubleshooting guide for Synapse errors and failure modes.

release-notes.description: Files in this domain: Final report from the synapse-doc-audit swarm (dashboard 1f36a3) on 2026-04-18.

marketing-posts.description: Files in this domain: Marketing/announcement post for LinkedIn introducing Synapse.

navigation.description: Files in this domain: Top-level documentation map and entry point for the Synapse documentation directory.

architecture.description: Files in this domain: Describes how data flows through Synapse end-to-end: workers write progress JSON, the WatcherService detects changes, the server validates and broadcasts via SSE/IPC, and the React dashboard merges static plan with dynamic progress to render.

data-flow.description: Files in this domain: Describes how data flows through Synapse end-to-end: workers write progress JSON, the WatcherService detects changes, the server validates and broadcasts via SSE/IPC, and the React dashboard merges static plan with dynamic progress to render.

master-agent.description: Files in this domain: Defines the master agent's dispatch protocol: eager dispatch loop, dependency-driven worker spawning, repair task creation when workers fail, and the circuit-breaker conditions that pause replanning.

dispatch.description: Files in this domain: Defines the master agent's dispatch protocol: eager dispatch loop, dependency-driven worker spawning, repair task creation when workers fail, and the circuit-breaker conditions that pause replanning.

monitoring.description: Files in this domain: Documents the master's monitoring and statusing protocol: how it reads progress files to derive overall state, when to append to logs.

deviations.description: Files in this domain: Defines the deviation reporting protocol for worker agents.

progress.description: Files in this domain: Detailed protocol for how workers populate their progress files: when to write (mandatory points: stage transitions, deviations, errors, completion), what to include (status, stage, message, milestones, deviations, logs, files_changed, annotations), and how the dashboard renders each field.

dependencies.description: Files in this domain: Specifies how a worker with depends_on tasks must read upstream progress files before implementing.

swarm-lifecycle.description: Files in this domain: Describes Synapse's circuit-breaker mechanism that pauses an in-flight swarm and triggers replanning when failure patterns indicate a planning error.

completion.description: Files in this domain: Specifies the swarm completion phase: how the master detects all-done, the final report format, post-swarm metrics calculation written to metrics.

schema.description: Files in this domain: Authoritative schema reference for initialization.

pki.description: Files in this domain: Authoritative schema reference for the Project Knowledge Index (PKI) at {project_root}/.

multi-dashboard.description: Files in this domain: Documents Synapse's two complementary preservation systems for swarm data: archives (full directory snapshots in Archive/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{task_name}/) and history (lightweight JSON summaries in history/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{task_name}.

preservation.description: Files in this domain: Documents Synapse's two complementary preservation systems for swarm data: archives (full directory snapshots in Archive/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{task_name}/) and history (lightweight JSON summaries in history/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{task_name}.

selection.description: Files in this domain: Specifies how Synapse commands choose which dashboard to act on.

queue.description: Files in this domain: Describes Synapse's overflow queue at {tracker_root}/queue/ that holds swarm plans when all active dashboards are occupied.
